Bug Title: Chapter Can Be Created with Negative Duration Value
Description: While creating a chapter, the system allows to enter a negative value in the duration field and still successfully create the chapter.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. In course management- click chapter
2. Fill in all the required fields
3. Enter a negative value in the set duration field (e.g., -10)
4. Click on the Create button
Expected Result: The system should display an error message (e.g., “Duration must be a positive number”)
Actual Result: The chapter is successfully created even when a negative duration value is provided.

Bug Title: No Phone Number Validation in Organization Sign-Up Form
Description: The phone number field in the organization sign-up form does not have any validation or limitation. Users can enter invalid  short phone numbers, and they succesfully registered
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the Organization Sign-Up page
2. Enter an invalid phone number (e.g., too short)
Fill in the rest of the required fields
Click on the Sign-Up button
Expected Result: The system should validate the phone number (e.g., correct length, numeric format) and show an error message if the input is invalid.
Actual Result: The form accepts short input in the phone number field without validation and allows successful sign-up.

Bug Title: Incorrect Option Labels in Question Paper
Description: In the question paper, True/False type questions are displayed with “Yes” and “No” options instead of the correct “True” and “False” labels. This may confuse users and does not match the expected format for such question types.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to login as student 
2. click my course
3. click play now
4. click start exam
5. observe the true/ false options
Expected Result: The options should be displayed as “True” and “False”.
Actual Result: The options are displayed as “Yes” and “No” instead of “True” and “False”.

Bug Title: Unnecessary Language Option (BN) Displayed in Language Selector in admin panel
Description: The language selector currently displays three options: English (EN), Arabic (AR), and Bengali (BN). However, only English and Arabic should be available.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the admin panel
2. Click on the language selector dropdown
3. observe the available language options
Expected Result: Only “English (EN)” and “Arabic (AR)” should be displayed in the language selector.
Actual Result: “Bengali (BN)” option is also displayed along with English and Arabic.

Bug Title: Incorrect Tab Title Displayed (KAF LMS Instead of KAF)
Description: When opening the application in a new browser tab, the tab title is displayed as “KAF LMS” instead of the expected “KAF”. This does not match the intended branding.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the application in a browser
2. Open it in a new tab
3. Check the tab title
Expected Result: The tab title should be displayed as “KAF”.
Actual Result: The tab title is displayed as “KAF LMS”

Bug Title: Video Preview Not Working Properly
Description: The video preview feature is not functioning as expected. Users are unable to properly view the preview of the video before accessing or playing the full content.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. In course management, click course
2. Click new course
3. upload any video with fill all required fields 
4. Click create
5. Observe the vedio section
Expected Result: The video preview should be display the correct content.
Actual Result: The video preview does not display properly.

Bug Title: Incorrect Total Transaction Amount Calculation
Description: In the admin panel, the total transaction amount is not being calculated accurately. The displayed total does not match the sum of individual transactions, which may lead to incorrect financial reporting.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the Admin Panel dashboard 
2. Navigate to the Transactions section
3. Check the total transaction amount
4. Compare it with the sum of individual transaction records
Expected Result: The total transaction amount should accurately reflect the sum of all listed transactions.
Actual Result: The total transaction amount is incorrect and does not match the actual sum of transactions.

Bug Title: New Subscribers Not Displayed at the Top of the List
Description: In the subscriber list, newly added subscribers are not shown at the beginning of the list. This makes it difficult to quickly identify the most recent subscribers.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. In subcriber management, cick subscrbe list 
2. Go to the Subscriber List page
3. Observe the position of the newly added subscriber
Expected Result: New subscribers should be displayed at the top of the list.
Actual Result: New subscribers are shown at the end of the list

Bug Title: Course Management – Hide Specific Fields on Course Overview Page
Description: On the Course Overview page in Course Management, several elements are currently visible that should be hidden. These include: Regular Price, Offer Price, Total Transactions, Course Price
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to Org panel
2. In course management, click course
3. click course for course overview
4. Observe the course overview page
Expected Result:
The following fields and buttons should be hidden on the Course Overview page:
Regular Price, Offer Price Total Transactions, Course Price
Actual Result: All the above fields currently visible.

Bug Title: Admin Panel – Student Login Redirects to Bad Gateway
Description: When a student tries to log in using their credentials in the Admin Panel, the system fails to handle the login and redirects to a Bad Gateway (502) error page.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to the Admin Panel login page.
2. Enter valid student credentials.
3. Click Login.
4. Observe the resulting page.
Expected Result: The system should display a proper access denied message or prevent login gracefully.
Actual Result: The system redirects to a Bad Gateway (502) error page.

Bug Title: FAQ Page Redirects to Access Denied
Description: In the admin panel, clicking on the FAQ option under Legal Pages redirects to an "Access Denied" page instead of opening the FAQ management page.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the admin panel
2. Go to Legal Pages
3. Click on FAQ
Expected Result: The FAQ page should open successfully, allowing the admin to view or manage FAQs.
Actual Result: The system redirects to an "Access Denied" page.

Bug Title: "502 Bad Gateway" Error on Invalid Currency Update
Description: When updating System Information with an invalid currency value, the system redirects to a “502 Bad Gateway” page.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to admin panel
2. click settings management 
3.click business setting
4. Enter an invalid currency value
5 Click update
Expected Result: A proper validation error message should be shown (e.g., “Invalid currency value”)
Actual Result: System redirects to a “502 Bad Gateway” error page

Bug Title: Admin Cannot update Own Permissions
Description: In the admin panel, the admin is unable to set or update permissions for their own account.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as admin
2. Go to Role & Permission settings
3. Try to update own permissions
Expected Result: Admin should be able to set or update their own permissions
Actual Result: Admin cannot set or update their own permissions

Bug Title: Error When Admin Updates Role & Permission for Organization
Description: When the admin tries to set or update roles and permissions for an organization and clicks the update button, an error occurs.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as admin
2. Go to Role & Permission settings
3. Select an organization
4. Set or update roles and permissions
5. Click “Update”
Expected Result: Roles and permissions should be updated successfully
Actual Result: Got error after clicking the “Update” button

Bug Title: Error When Searching Subscriber by ID in subscriber list
Description:
When searching a subscriber by ID in the subscriber list, the system shows an error:
“HTTP 500 Internal Server Error”.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to Subscriber List
2. Search by subscriber ID
3. Observe the result
Expected Result: Subscriber details should be shown correctly based on the searched ID
Actual Result: System shows error: “Call to undefined method App\Models\Subscriber::user()”

Bug Title: Payment Bypass via Receipt Upload Without Validation in manual subscriber
Description: In the manual subscriber process, any uploaded image as a payment receipt is accepted without validation, and the system assigns a paid plan instantly. This allows users to bypass actual payment verification.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to Admin panel
2. Click Subscriber management
3. Click Manual Subscriber section
4. Add a new subscriber
5. Upload any random image as receipt
6. Click Assign Plan
Expected Result: Receipt should be verified and plan assigned only after approval
Actual Result: Any image is accepted and paid plan is assigned instantly

Bug Title: Missing Eye Icon in Password Field on all Update Profile or create org page
Description: On the admin update profile page, the password field does not have an eye icon to toggle password visibility.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the admin panel
2. Go to the update profile page
3. Check the password field
Expected Result: The password field should include an eye icon to show/hide the password.
Actual Result: The password field does not have an eye icon for visibility toggle.

Bug Title: Unauthorized Email Error When Logging in with Admin-Created Organization
Description: When an admin creates a new organization account, logging in to the organization panel using that email shows an "Unauthorized Email" error.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the admin panel
2. Create a new organization account
3. Log out from admin
4. Go to the organization login panel
5. Try to log in using the created organization email1
Expected Result: The organization should be able to log in successfully using the provided email credentials.
Actual Result: An "Unauthorized Email" error is shown during login.

Bug Title: 413 Request Entity Too Large Error When Uploading Small Video
Description: While creating a new course, uploading a very small video file (0.5 seconds) triggers a "413 Request Entity Too Large" error.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the admin panel
2. Go to create a new course
3. Try to upload a short video (e.g., 0.5 seconds)
4. Submit the form
Expected Result: The video should upload successfully without any error, especially since the file size is very small.
Actual Result: A "413 Request Entity Too Large" error is shown even for a very small video file.

Bug Title: No Phone Number Validation When Creating New Organization
Description: While creating a new organization, there is no proper phone number validation. Invalid numbers (e.g., very short numbers like “54”) are accepted and the organization profile is created successfully.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to create a new organization through admin panel
2. Enter an invalid phone number (e.g., 54)
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: The system should validate the phone number and show an error for invalid input.
Actual Result: The system accepts invalid phone numbers and creates the organization profile successfully.

Bug Title: File Type Selection Not Working in Chapter
Description: In the chapter section, selecting different file types (e.g., Upload Files, Cloud Links) does not trigger any change in the UI or input fields.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to chapter creation/edit section
2. Select file type options (e.g., Upload Files, Cloud Links)
3. Observe the form
Expected Result: The form should update based on the selected file type (e.g., show upload option or link input field accordingly).
Actual Result: No changes occur when selecting different file types; the form remains the same.

Bug Title: Certificate Logo Not Updating in Downloaded Certificate
Description: In the admin panel, when the certificate logo is changed, the updated logo does not appear in the downloaded certificate. Instead, no logo is visible.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in to the admin panel
2. Go to certificate settings
3. Change/upload a new certificate logo
4. Save the changes
5. Download a certificate
Expected Result: The downloaded certificate should display the updated logo.
Actual Result: The logo is not updated and no logo appears in the downloaded certificate.

Bug Title: Unable to Remove Extra Course Outline
Description: In course management, extra course outline items cannot be removed or deleted.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to course management
2. Click on a course
3. Navigate to the course outline section
4. Try to remove any extra outline item
Expected Result: User should be able to delete/remove extra course outline items.
Actual Result: Extra course outline items cannot be removed.
